task_completion.description: Agent successfully logged into the Splunk web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Splunk Web UI is visible in a web browser (e.g., the 'Search & Reporting' app or Splunk home screen is displayed).

task_completion.description: Agent executed a search query to analyze successful SSH authentications in the security_logs index.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Splunk search bar contains a query referencing 'index="security_logs"' along with terms related to SSH, successful logins, and geographic/country data. Search results or statistics should be visible.

task_completion.description: Agent saved the detection logic as a report named 'Impossible_Travel_Detection'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the report 'Impossible_Travel_Detection' was saved, or the report is visible in the Splunk 'Reports' tab.
A dashboard titled 'Geo_Security_Monitoring' is visible on the screen, either in edit mode, view mode, or listed in the 'Dashboards' tab.

task_completion.description: The dashboard contains at least two panels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Geo_Security_Monitoring' dashboard displays two or more distinct visualization panels or widgets.

task_completion.description: One of the dashboard panels is a map visualization showing geographic distribution.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least one panel on the 'Geo_Security_Monitoring' dashboard renders a geographic map (e.g., a Choropleth map or Cluster map) displaying data points or regions.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Splunk Web UI rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Splunk web interface in a browser to create the report and dashboard.

integrity.description: The search results and dashboard visualizations are generated from actual Splunk data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visualizations and search results appear to be dynamically generated by Splunk, not static images, manually typed mock data, or text files.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing Splunk configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using a text editor (like nano or vim) to modify Splunk .conf files or XML dashboard definitions directly in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target index: security_logs. Required report name: Impossible_Travel_Detection. Required dashboard name: Geo_Security_Monitoring. Splunk credentials: admin / SplunkAdmin1!.
